name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Mutual NDA for sharing confidential information between two parties.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page / order form to accompany the Common Paper Mutual NDA.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Cloud Service Agreement (CSA) for SaaS and cloud-hosted software.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for early-access product collaboration.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement defining uptime commitments and remedies.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Professional Services Agreement for consulting and implementation work.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement for GDPR-compliant data processing arrangements.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement for on-premise or downloadable software.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Partnership Agreement for reseller and referral partnerships.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Pilot Agreement for time-limited product trials.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Business Associate Agreement (BAA) for HIPAA-compliant data handling.

name: AI Addendum
description: Common Paper Standard AI Addendum for use of AI features within software agreements.
